identity.name: E1
identity.philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Emotion First. Content is King.

headings.usage: Use for all section titles, headers, and hero text. Bold weights (700/800) for impact.

body.usage: Use for forms, descriptions, and data tables. Excellent legibility for dimensions and technical specs.

mono.usage: Use for order IDs, dimensions (mm), and price calculations.

primary.name: Industrial Slate
primary.usage: Main text, primary borders, heavy accents.

accent.name: Technical Blue
accent.usage: Primary buttons, active states, focus rings. High visibility.

background.name: Factory White
background.usage: Page background. Not pure white to reduce eye strain.

success.name: Safety Green
success.usage: Completed orders, confirmed status, export success.

rules: No gradients for backgrounds. Use flat, solid colors.
Use 1px borders (Slate-200) to define areas. Shadows should be subtle (shadow-sm).
Text inputs must have a distinct background (Slate-50) vs the surface.

public_order_form.type: Single Page Long-Scroll with Sticky Summary
public_order_form.spacing: Gap-8 for sections, Gap-4 for internal grids.

structure: Stats Row: Total Orders, Revenue, Pending
Main Table: Orders List with Status Badges and Quick Actions

cards.style: Flat, 1px border, no shadow by default. Hover: Border-blue-600, shadow-md.
cards.usage: Selection of Installation Type, Mesh Type.

inputs.style: H-12 (48px) height for touch targets. Bg-slate-50. Focus: Ring-2 Ring-blue-600.
inputs.validation: Show error messages below input in red-600.

buttons.primary: Bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700. Sharp corners or rounded-md (sm).
buttons.telegram_main: If inside Telegram Web App, use the native MainButton, else simulate it with a fixed bottom bar.

visual_enhancers.badges: rounded-full px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold. Green for 'Done', Gray for 'New'.

motion_guidelines.interactions: Fast transitions (150ms). No bounce. Linear or Ease-out.
motion_guidelines.loading: Skeleton loaders for data tables. Spinning loader for form submission.

accessibility_checklist: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text.
Focus states must be clearly visible (Blue ring).
Support keyboard navigation for the form.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic 'Inter' font for headings.
Use 'data-testid' on all inputs and buttons.
Design for Mobile First (Telegram Web App context).
Admin Dashboard can support Dark Mode, but Order Form should be Light Mode for clarity.
Do not use gradients. Stick to flat, clean, industrial aesthetics.
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Install necessary fonts: Manrope and IBM Plex Sans.
2. Configure Tailwind theme with the 'colors' defined above.
3. Build the Order Form as a 'Long Scroll' page with distinct sections.
4. Use the provided image URLs for the 'Type Selection' cards.
5. Implement the 'Admin Dashboard' using Shadcn Table component.
6. Ensure the 'Google Sheets Export' button is prominent in the Admin UI.
7. Mock the Telegram MainButton behavior if testing in browser.
